title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Birlasoft International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Birlasoft International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Birlasoft International Enterprises:
Birlasoft International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft International Enterprises!
